letI : CreatesLimits solidToCondensed := createsLimitsOfFullyFaithfulOfIso (fun {J} _ F => by
    intro c hc
    refine ⟨?_⟩
    let P := (free ℤ).obj (ℕ∪{∞}).toCondensed
    let Φ := pre (oneMinusShift ℤ)
    let F' := F ⋙ solidToCondensed
    let H := ihom P
    have : PreservesLimits H := inferInstance
    let k : H.obj c.pt ≅ limit (F' ⋙ H) := preservesLimitIso H F' c hc
    have comm : Φ.app c.pt ≫ k.hom = k.hom ≫ limMap (whiskerLeft F' Φ) := by
      apply limit.hom_ext; intro j
      simp only [preservesLimitIso_hom_π, limit.lift_π, Functor.mapCone_π_app,
        NatTrans.naturality, Assoc.assoc]
      rfl
    have : IsIso (whiskerLeft F' Φ) := NatIso.isIso_of_isIso_app _ (fun j ↦
      @IsSolid.oneMinusShift_induces_iso _ _ (F.obj j).isSolid)
    rw [← IsIso.inv_comp_eq, ← Assoc.assoc, IsIso.eq_comp_inv] at comm
    rw [comm]
    infer_instance)
  hasLimits_of_hasLimits_createsLimits solidToCondensed

⟨fun _ _ ↦ ⟨fun F ↦ by
  let F' := F ⋙ solidToCondensed
  let c' := limit.cone F'
  let h' := limit.isLimit F'
  have : IsSolid c'.pt := ⟨by
    let H := internalHom (P ℤ)
    let τ : H ⟶ H := pre (oneMinusShift ℤ)
    let α := whiskerLeft F' τ
    have : IsIso α := NatIso.isIso_of_isIso_app fun j ↦ (F.obj j).isSolid.1
    let cH := H.mapCone c'
    let d := (Cones.postcompose α).obj cH
    let f : d ⟶ cH := { hom := τ.app c'.pt, w := fun j ↦ τ.naturality (c'.π.app j) }
    have hcH : IsLimit cH := isLimitOfPreserves H h'
    have hd : IsLimit d := (IsLimit.postcomposeHomEquiv α cH).symm hcH
    haveI : IsIso f := IsLimit.hom_isIso hd hcH f
    exact (Cones.forget _).map_isIso f |>.out⟩
  haveI : FullyFaithful solidToCondensed := InducedCategory.fullyFaithful toLightCondAb
  exact ⟨{ pt := ⟨c'.pt⟩, π := { app := fun j ↦ c'.π.app j, naturality := fun _ _ g ↦ c'.π.naturality g } },
    isLimitOfReflects solidToCondensed h'⟩⟩⟩
